name: beyond-grid-retrieval
description: Apply Beyond the Grid to beyond problems. Technique: Harnessing the full potential of visually-rich documents requires retrieval syst...
content:
## Overview

This skill implements the technique from "Beyond the Grid: Layout-Informed Retrieval".

Key contribution: Harnessing the full potential of visually-rich documents requires retrieval systems that understand not just text, but intricate layouts, a core challenge in Visual Document Retrieval (VDR). The prevailing multi-vector architectures, while powerful, face a crucial storage bottleneck that current optimization strategies, such as embedding merging, pruning, or using abstract tokens, fail to resolve without compromising performance or ignoring vital layout cues.

## When to use

- Apply when solving beyond problems
- When baseline approaches are insufficient
- Working with structured problem spaces

## When NOT to use

- If problem constraints limit complexity
- When simpler methods achieve target performance
- Time-critical scenarios with strict latency needs

## Core Technique

The paper proposes an approach through:

1. Problem formulation from the paper
2. Algorithm implementation as described
3. Integration with existing systems
4. Evaluation against baselines

## Implementation

1. Understand problem requirements
2. Implement core algorithm components
3. Configure evaluation metrics from paper
4. Compare against baseline methods
5. Tune hyperparameters for your domain

## References

Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01666
